zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales於大約0895年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，她的父親King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt117歲，母親Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon97歲。她和Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於0943年在威爾士卡馬特史爾卡馬特享年49歲，埋葬在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales was born about 0895, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt, was 117 and her mother, Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon, was 97. She had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. She died in 0943, in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales est née environ 0895, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt, avait 117 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon, avait 97 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. Elle est décédée en 0943, à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

de.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales um 0895 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt 117 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon 97. Sie hatte mit Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 0943 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales und wurde in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. Morì nel 0943, nel Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Walesが約0895年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsylltは117歳，母Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallonは97歳であった。彼女はHywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britonsとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は0943年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンで49歳で死去し，ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales(이)가 대략 0895년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt(은)는 117세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon(은)는 97세였다. 그녀는 Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 0943년 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales nasceu aproximadamente 0895, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt, tinha 117 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon, tinha 97 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. Ela faleceu em 0943, em Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales родилась около 0895 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Meuric Of Seisyllwg Ap Dyfnwal ap Arthen ap Stitsyllt было 117 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Meurig ap Dyfnwallon, 97. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. Она умерла в 0943 г. в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс.

Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons. Murió en 0943, en Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales.
